files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections as indicated by Roman numerals I-IV. Each lesson covers a different subject area: Theology, Work and Business, Genealogy, and Home Courses. The file ends with announcements about the Relief Society Song Book and School of Obstetrics and Nursing which appear to be part of the overall Guide Lessons section.
